response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company]'s earnings fell 38.6% from 2019 to 2020.  
2. [Company]'s EPS down $0.93 in 2020 from the previous year.  
3. [Company]'s share prices down 34% from 2019 to 2020.  
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product category, [Product].  
5. Total liabilities increased from $271,547,000 to $356,459,000 from 2018 to 2019.  
6. [Company] produced 4.7% fewer units of [Product] in the first half of 2020 as a result of weak demand from [Industry] due to the [Event].  
7. [Competitor] achieved [Achievement] in [Year]. [Company] has no [Feature] offerings.  
8. [Competitor] achieved its goal to provide [Feature] in [Percentage] of its [Product] houses by [Date]. [Company]'s [Product] has no [Feature].  
9. Sales to [Company]'s top ten customers represented approximately [Percentage] of their net sales during fiscal year [Year].  
10. [Company] faces multiple pending lawsuits in [Year], from [Charge] to [Violation].
